policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: 2 methodology in the Appendix for a more detailed explanation. 8. Fugitive emissions for productions (emissions from refrigerants and fire suppressants) were not calculated due to a lack of data availability in 2024. In future years WBD will explore collecting data related to fugitive emissions and improve data granularity. 9. The Scope 3 GHG emissions inventory has been prepared using the guidance set forth in the WRI/WBCSD GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard under which a company can choose which Scope 3 emissions to report. 10. In line with revised methodology and emissions factors, the total FY2023 Scope 3 emissions has been recalculated to 1,435,200 mt CO2e. 11. For FY2024, WBD reported purchased goods and services and capital goods together as WBD’s procurement system includes spend amounts for both categories, and spend on capital goods cannot be disaggregated at this time. 25 Appendix Our Value Chain Governance Our Planet Our Community Our People Introduction
